biological_replicate: the well-differentiated CRC cell line Caco-2 is known to form well-defined junctions
technical_replicate: the experiment was repeated in three independent biological replicates on different days, each containing three technical replicates.
experimental_design: Caco-2 cell line as a model system for a series of phenotypic studies.
factor_value: GIV and GIV-L may have antagonistic effects on cell growth, proliferation (cell cycle), and survival.
number_of_fractions: No fractionation is mentioned in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: Only one type of cell line is described.
number_of_samples: 1 biological replicate and no fractions imply 1 sample.
